content: Create ledger integrity check script to verify balance calculations and transfer linkages
Run integrity check script and save report to /app/test_reports/
Audit transfer service for destructive operations and ensure reversals are used instead of deletions
Fix backend linting warnings in server.py (flake8 issues)
Call testing agent for comprehensive testing with NEW test users only
Review test report and fix any critical issues found
Update plan.md to mark Phase 1 as COMPLETED
